question: Is the neon sign reflection text ("LUCKY'S NOODLE BAR OPEN LATE") completely removed from the puddle?
Is a reflection of a crescent moon visible in the puddle in place of the neon sign text?
Is the crescent moon reflection positioned strictly within the puddle boundaries where the original neon sign reflection was located?
Does the crescent moon reflection exhibit distortions consistent with the water ripples and surface texture of the puddle?
Does the crescent moon reflection appear as a luminous reflection on the water surface rather than a solid object superimposed on top?
Is the image free of any new moon object added outside the puddle (e.g., in the sky or on the dry asphalt)?
Are the boundaries and shape of the puddle unchanged?
Is the texture of the asphalt (including cracks and wet sheen) outside the puddle completely preserved?
Are the small circular raindrop rings and ripple patterns within the puddle preserved (excluding the area of the new reflection)?
Is the edited area free of ghosting, outlines, or remnants of the original neon letters?
Is the edited reflection area free of unnatural blurring, compositing seams, or visual artifacts?
